response.justification: The candidate demonstrates over 12 years of full-stack development experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React—directly aligning with the primary stack. Their work on AI-agent infrastructure, scalability, and tooling at re:cinq and Optilyz showcases senior-level ownership, architectural contributions, and measurable impact in enterprise-grade environments.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with the exact stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Nest.js)
Proven track record of designing scalable systems and AI-agent tooling
Diverse domain expertise (automation, fintech, GIS) with open-source contributions
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Vitest (though testing frameworks are listed broadly)
Some roles involved niche languages (DLang) not relevant to this role
German language skills are basic (though English is fluent)
